title: anyTypePage
description: Properties of all Pages V3 pages.

name.description: The name of the page. Must be unique.

is_visible.description: A boolean value that controls whether the page is available to users or visible in any navigation menus.

parent_id.description: ID of the parent page, if any.

sort_order.description: Determines the order in which the page is displayed in the parent page’s menu. Pages with lower integers display earlier.

type.description: Determines the type of page. See [Pages v3 page types](/docs/rest-content/pages#page-types) for more about the differences.

is_homepage.description: Determines whether this page loads at the siteʼs root route. For example, at `https://example.com/`.

is_customers_only.description: When `true`, this page is not visible to merchant users who are signed in to the store control panel.

url.description: Relative URL on the storefront for this page.
